messages.title: Messages
messages.empty: Run a search to view messages.
messages.unsupportedMedia: Inline preview is not supported for this media type.

errors.channelRequired: Please enter the channel username first.

parser.title: Telegram Parser
parser.description: This section is prepared for parser workflows. We will add sources, rules, and scheduled collection here.
parser.subtitle: Online Telegram data collection and export
parser.keywordHint: Keyword is set, date range is ignored and all matching messages are collected.

errors.customBothDates: Please specify both custom period dates.
errors.customTooLong: Custom period cannot exceed one month.

analytics.title: Telegram Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Analyze channel activity for the last 1 to 7 days.

fraud.title: Anti-Fraud
fraud.hint: Risk signals based on suspicious engagement patterns.

help.label: What is this data?
help.formula: Post score formula. Variables: V = views, F = forwards, R = replies, Re = reactions, G = gifts. Calculation: score = V*wV + F*wF + R*wR + Re*wRe + G*wG.
help.antiFraud: Anti-Fraud risk score (0-100) is formed from trigger points. We detect suspicious patterns (for example interactions without views, time bursts, abnormal ratios), sum trigger scores, and map risk level: low < 30, medium 30-59, high >= 60.
help.funnel: Shows the step-by-step conversion from all posts to posts with meaningful engagement.
help.audience: Shows author structure: concentration, recurring contributors, and peak activity hours.
help.activity: Shows period dynamics by bucket: number of posts, views, and interactions.
help.distribution: Shows which media formats and reactions dominate in the selected period.
help.opinionLeaders: Shows top authors by impact score and engagement, with trends by day.
help.topPosts: Shows the highest-impact posts ranked by weighted score.

empty.title: Pick a channel and period
empty.description: The analytics module aggregates live Telegram messages and renders charts, totals, and top posts for the selected period.

errors.rangeTooLong: The custom date range cannot exceed 7 days.

charts.activityHint: Messages, views, and interactions across the chosen range.
charts.funnelHint: Message flow from publication to engagement signals.
charts.audienceHint: Author activity and concentration for the selected period.
charts.distributionHint: Top media types and reaction groups.
charts.opinionLeadersHint: Top authors by impact, based on score and interactions.
charts.opinionLeadersByDayHint: Daily activity of opinion leaders within the selected range.
charts.author: Author
charts.topPostsHint: Posts ranked by an engagement score.

search.title: Username OSINT Search
search.description: Check username availability and traces across open platforms.
search.label: Username

results.title: Results
results.empty: Run a username check to view platform matches.

analytics.tabDescription: Confidence, similarity variants and graph payload in live mode.
analytics.empty: Run a username check to build analytics.

help.similarity: Generated username variants are checked on priority platforms to estimate collision and impersonation risk.
help.graph: Payload summary of entities and links built from live results. Use node/edge count to gauge graph density.
help.graphCanvas: Interactive graph: click a node to highlight connected entities, drag to rearrange, and use wheel to zoom.

errors.usernameRequired: Enter a username with at least 2 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profilePage.title: Profile settings

profilePage.resendVerification: Click here to resend the verification email.
profilePage.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.

securityPage.title: Security settings
securityPage.updatePasswordDescription: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure
securityPage.twoFactorEnableHint: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
securityPage.twoFactorEnabledHint: You will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.

twoFactorSetup.enabledDescription: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
twoFactorSetup.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish setup.
twoFactorSetup.enableDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then continue.

twoFactorRecovery.title: 2FA recovery codes
twoFactorRecovery.description: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
twoFactorRecovery.footerPrefix: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click

twoFactorErrors.fetchSetupKey: Failed to fetch a setup key.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirmDescription: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

welcome.heroTitle: Starting point for Telegram intelligence workflows
welcome.heroDescription: The platform helps collect data, filter noise, and surface meaningful signals. You can scale this baseline into deep analytics pipelines and investigation scenarios.

features.monitoringText: Collect Telegram signals in one workspace without manual routine.
features.osintText: Track entities, relationships, and campaign dynamics in context.
features.dashboardsText: Focus on key metrics and quickly move from hypotheses to validation.
